description: Configure five system-level security settings on the Nx Witness VMS server (https://localhost:7001) to comply with the organization's security hardening policy using credentials 'admin' / 'Admin1234!'. The required configuration is: sessionLimitMinutes (15), autoDiscoveryEnabled (false), trafficEncryptionForced (true), statisticsAllowed (false), and insecureDeprecatedApiEnabled (false). Create a summary report listing the changes made at /home/ga/security_hardening_report.txt.
